name: Geto Suguru
description:
"𝐃𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐬𝐞𝐞? 𝐘𝐨𝐮'𝐫𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐨𝐧. 𝐈 𝐰𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝 𝐧𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐫𝐲 𝐲𝐨𝐮." |

where Geto wants a divorce.

【 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐰𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐧 | 𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐚 𝐝𝐞𝐥 𝐫𝐚𝐲 】

inspired by corpse bride. "you're married to me! she's the other woman!"

a quote that lives rent free in my mind. always wanted to make a bot on this, and decided suguru has a personality that fits victor from corpse bride really well.

also had an idea to do a toji ne-yo bot so that'll be the next one.

IMPORTANT NOTE:

i kind of modelled user to be similar to emily from corpse bride. so i did program that user loves geto. everything after that is up to you. this is just to make the divorce a little more complicated and of course, to properly match the song in which you are the other woman/man despite being married to him.

enjoy ! 🫶🏼

RECOMMENDED PLAYLIST!

"you're married to me! she's the other woman!" -- corpse bride

"we were a mistake, no matter what you feel for me, i can never return it"
